title: Tai Chi
description: Push your workout to the next level with high intensity circuit training. Circuit routines provide a rigorous, all-body workout as you tackle a sequence of physical challenges designed to get you fitter and stronger.

**Your selection:**

Legs, Bums and Tums

A great full body workout, targeting those challenging areas. Sculpt, tone, conditioning and build strength whilst focusing on your bums, tums and thighs. This class does exactly what is says on the tin – what more could you ask for!

**Date:** Mon 06 Jul 2026
